# PERF-141 negative: cache r.URL.Query() in a local variable
lang: go
file: PERF-141-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = w
	q := r.URL.Query()
	page := q.Get("page")
	size := q.Get("size")
	tag := q.Get("tag")
	_ = page
	_ = size
	_ = tag
}
